# 03-Upload a package [POST]

`POST /api/v4/projects/{id}/packages/pypi`

Uploads a PyPI package for a specified project.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `any` | `path` | Yes | The ID or URL-encoded path of the project |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "content": string (required), // The package file to be published (generated by Multipart middleware)
  "name": string (required), // Name of the package
  "requires_python": string, // PyPI version required for the package
  "md5_digest": string, // MD5 checksum of the package
  "sha256_digest": string, // SHA256 checksum of the package
  "metadata_version": string, // Metadata version of the package
  "author_email": string, // Email address for the package author
  "description": string, // Description of the package
  "description_content_type": string, // Type of content for the package description
  "summary": string, // Short summary of the package
  "keywords": string, // Keywords listed for the package
}
```
### Responses

#### 201 - Created

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 401 - Unauthorized

#### 403 - Forbidden

#### 404 - Not Found

#### 422 - Unprocessable Entity
